mnemonics.title: Cannot Overload Operators
mnemonics.content: DOTS - Dot (.), Object.* (.*), Two colons (::), Sizeof/Typeid? - Actually: Dot (.), .*, ::, ?:, sizeof, typeid

mnemonics.title: Assignment Operator Return
mnemonics.content: CRR - Chaining Requires Reference - Assignment operators should return reference to *this
